inline_comments.message:
Before adding this, you'll need to update sdnc/oam/installation/sdnc/pom.xml to add the installer for this package as a dependency so that the associated jars get installed.  Otherwise, platform won't come up.

Suggest you comment this block out for now, then after the sdnc/oam change is merged, submit a separate change to sdnc/northound with this block uncommented.
